subcodes.first_line: O concourse of the earth! Beware lest the veils of names prevent you from turning toward God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ملا الارض ایاکم ان تمنعکم سبحات الاسماء من التوجه الی الله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
